name: impact-preview --format text emits a human-readable per-rule summary line per F-6
command: mkdir -p tree && printf 'eval(0)\n' > tree/x.js && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"no-eval","detector":"grep -n eval || true"}]}' > r.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file r.json --root tree --format text 2>out.txt && grep -q 'impact-preview: rule no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
